positive: A stylized, symmetrical circular illustration featuring a collection of whimsical woodland creatures (fox, owl, deer, rabbit) nestled amongst highly detailed flora like ferns and luminous mushrooms. The composition must be contained within a clean white border to maximize print usability. Style: Modern folk art mixed with Art Nouveau aesthetics. Use rich jewel tones (emerald, sapphire, amethyst) contrasted with earthy moss greens and muted terracotta. Strong, clear silhouettes, crisp linework, and visible halftone dot texture suitable for screen printing. Central composition, high contrast, vector art feel, clean negative space.
negative: blur, text, watermark, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, noise, messy, messy lines, bad anatomy, limbs, extra limbs, asymmetrical, logo, symbol, copyright, gradient, sketch, photorealism
